name: Trash Bag Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cans Chopped or sliced ripe olives, drained (4-1/4 oz each)
2 cans Ranch or chili beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and drain excess fat.
2. Add taco seasoning mix to the browned beef and prepare according to package directions.
3. Cool the mixture thoroughly.
4. Toss all ingredients in a large plastic bag or container.
